persona_pain: Deals dying in silence while champions go dark and pipeline looks fine until it doesn't
persona_blurb: You carry a number. Your whole job depends on deals staying alive and champions staying warm. Most CRM data tells you what happened last month — these plays tell you what to do today about the deal that's going quiet. You need fast inbound follow-up, multi-threading on booked meetings, and reactivation plays for pipeline that's been silent too long.

recipes.name: Auto-connect on meeting or signup
recipes.outcome: Agent connects with prospects the moment they book or submit, before the moment cools

recipes.name: Social engager flow — leadership's audience
recipes.outcome: Reach people engaging with company content before they go cold

recipes.name: Website visitor play
recipes.outcome: Turn pricing/demo/product-page visits into LinkedIn touches while intent is active

recipes.name: AE AI SDR — daily approval queue
recipes.outcome: View a HubSpot contact/company list or discover a new ICP list, enrich each prospect, and draft up to 10/15 AE-owned LinkedIn touches per day for approval

recipes.name: Scoop-up slipped leads — stale opps
recipes.outcome: Identify and re-engage dormant deals and pipeline that has gone quiet 30+ days

recipes.name: Meeting-booked multi-thread
recipes.outcome: When a meeting books, auto-connect other decision-makers so you're not single-threaded

recipes.name: Closed-lost reengagement
recipes.outcome: Re-engage closed-lost deals with no engagement for 60+ days via a fresh LinkedIn touch
